name: 3rd Street Park
description: Come play pickleball at 3rd Street Park in Ocean City, MD! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Cypress Park
description: Cypress Park is a place to play pickleball in Pocomoke City, MD. There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Fountainhead Towers
description: Fountainhead Towers is a place to play pickleball in Ocean City, MD. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are private.

name: Gorman Park
description: One dedicated pickleball court with permanent nets and lines. Two other pickleball courts that share the venue with one tennis court. These two have permanent lines, but you have to bring your own nets.

name: John Walter Smith Park
description: John Walter Smith Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Snow Hill, MD. There are 6 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Lower Shore Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Lower Shore Family YMCA in Pocomoke City, MD! There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water.

name: Northside Park
description: Northside Park is a place to play pickleball in Ocean City, MD. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.

name: Ocean City Racquet Center
description: 6 dedicated pickleball courts with an additional 4 blended pickleball courts.
fees: Fee required — A seasonal pass entitles you to unlimited play. You may reserve a court 7 days in advance. Memberships are non transferable. If you bring a guest, there will be a guest fee.  Adult Indi

name: Ocean City Recreation & Parks Center
description: Come play pickleball at Ocean City Recreation & Parks Center in Ocean City, MD! There are 12 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
fees: Fee required — $3 OC Residents/$5 Non OC Residents

name: Ocean Pines Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Ocean Pines Community Center in Berlin, MD! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Ocean Pines Racquet Center
description: Ocean Pines Racquet Center is a place to play pickleball in Ocean Pines, MD. There are 16 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, water, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Pocomoke Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Pocomoke Middle School in Pocomoke City, MD! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Showell Recreation Area
description: 1 court marked for Pickleball with tennis net, the other court marked for 2 pickleball courts(bring your own nets)

name: Stephen Decatur Park
description: Stephen Decatur Park is a place to play pickleball in Berlin, MD. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include lights and restrooms. The courts are free.
